description: Modal dialog for browsing and adding widgets to a dashboard, with category sidebar filtering, text search, and grid display of available widgets from an IWidgetRegistry.

examples.title: Widget selector in a dashboard
examples.code:
<TmWidgetSelector WidgetRegistry="WidgetRegistry"
                  ExistingWidgets="@existingWidgetIds"
                  OnSelect="OnWidgetSelected"
                  OnClose="() => showSelector = false" />
